pages.title: In-Person Meeting Capture
pages.kicker: Virtual bots are easy; physical rooms need capture infrastructure

cards.title: Virtual meeting
cards.body: A bot can join the call because the audio stream already exists online.

cards.title: Physical meeting
cards.body: A room needs microphones, placement, connectivity, and secure sync.

cards.title: Product gap
cards.body: Phones work for small rooms but do not scale cleanly to enterprise capture.
